13:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne does not automatically detect or redact PII. Best practices:"}]
14:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Tag PII-containing memories: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"tags=[\"pii\"]"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Use encryption for sensitive data"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Implement retention policies for PII"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Audit access to PII-tagged memories"}],"\n"]}]
